ModMetaData.name: VRE Custom Icons (HSK Bundle)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson — Bundling by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Standalone bundle of Vanilla Races Expanded — Custom Icons. Adds extra icon options for the Biotech custom xenotype creator (Animal Heads, Biological, Body, Class, Combat, Cosmetic, Dragon, Elemental, Faction, Letters, Monster, Nature, Numbers, Robot, Saurid, Symbols).
This is a pure UI utility mod — no genes, no abilities, no recipes, no combat, no balance changes. Nothing needs HSK or CE patching.
Bundled here as part of the HSK-Race-Collection so users have a single drop-in replacement instead of needing the Steam Workshop version. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Custom Icons alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
Original mod by Oskar Potocki and Sarg Bjornson. Bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC.
